steps: Navigate to the project-generation workspace from overview, sidebar, mobile navigation, or Command-K
Verify the three exact repository-supported target tuples
Clear every target and verify the explicit at-least-one-target error
Enter a synthetic project slug, namespace, description, and entity
Select C# and create the in-memory generation-plan preview
Verify the DRAFT announcement, selected target, CLI reference, NOT_RUN execution state, and NOT_CERTIFIED boundary
Repeat layout and touch-target checks at desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
expected: The workspace creates only a memory-scoped project-generation preview, preserves exact target versions, remains usable without horizontal overflow, and performs no generator, approval, deployment, or certification side effect.
